welcome.title: Welcome to SmartGen Docs Changelog
welcome.message: This changelog automatically records every update made to the SmartGen Docs repository. Each entry includes commit information, release notes, changed files, timestamps, and development history, providing complete transparency for contributors and users.
welcome.description: Every push to the main branch automatically generates a new changelog entry through GitHub Actions. This file serves as the single source of truth for project updates and powers the live changelog page on the SmartGen Docs website.

project.name: SmartGen Docs
project.description: A modern, open-source documentation framework for building fast, searchable, SEO-friendly documentation websites, developer portals, API references, and knowledge bases.
project.author: Sayad Md Bayezid Hosan

entries.title: Initial Release
entries.description: Initial release of SmartGen Docs with automated changelog support.
entries.author: Sayad Md Bayezid Hosan
